title: Squirrel Removal in Mill Basin, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Mill Basin, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, entry sealing & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Mill Basin homes. Call today!
intro: Mill Basin homeowners know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming backyard visitors to serious pests when they invade attics, soffits, and walls. Our professional squirrel removal service provides comprehensive solutions for residential properties throughout this waterfront Brooklyn neighborhood. With pricing between $900 and $2,500 depending on infestation severity, we deliver humane, effective squirrel control tailored to Mill Basin's unique housing needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Mill Basin for years, understanding the specific challenges posed by squirrels in this area's predominantly single-family homes and waterfront properties. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods, complete entry point sealing, and provide full attic restoration to ensure squirrels don't return to your Mill Basin residence.
localContext: Mill Basin's tree-lined streets and proximity to the Mill Basin Marina create an ideal habitat for squirrels, which often seek shelter in the area's classic brick colonials and Cape Cod-style homes during colder months. The neighborhood's mature oak and maple trees provide easy access points to rooflines, making professional exclusion services essential for protecting your property near Avenue U and along the Mill Basin waterways.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Mill Basin typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. A single squirrel with one entry point may cost around $900, while multiple squirrels with extensive attic damage and several access points can reach $2,500. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Mill Basin properties.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Mill Basin homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Mill Basin homes through gaps in soffits, roof vents, uncapped chimneys, and holes where tree branches touch the roofline. The neighborhood's mature trees make it easy for squirrels to jump onto roofs and exploit even small openings. They can chew through wood, plastic, and even some metals to gain access to warm attics, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Mill Basin humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane squirrel removal methods in compliance with New York State wildlife regulations. Our process includes live trapping when necessary, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, and we never use poisons or lethal methods. We also ensure any juvenile squirrels are reunited with mothers when possible before sealing entry points.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Mill Basin home?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours for Mill Basin residents. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and their activity patterns. Once all squirrels are confirmed out, we immediately seal all entry points and can begin attic cleanup and restoration work to prevent future infestations.
